news.headline: PIRTEK USA expands with 11 new territories, 4 locations, and climbs 20 spots in franchise rankings.
news.summary: An on-site and retail hydraulic and industrial hose service provider has expanded its reach significantly. PIRTEK USA has added 11 new territories, opened 4 locations, and ascended by 20 spots in the top 400 franchise rankings. This growth was reported from their headquarters in Rockledge, Florida, on October 17, 2024.

news.headline: Mass Virtual and U.S. Air Force hold successful Virtual Hangar User Workshop in Orlando with 100+ attendees from various countries. Collaboration among defense professionals emphasized.
news.summary: In Orlando, Mass Virtual and the U.S. Air Force Integrated Technology Platform (ITP) office held the 2024 Virtual Hangar User Workshop, drawing more than 100 participants. Attendees included Airmen from the U.S., Japan, United Kingdom, and Germany, along with Guardsmen and officials from the U.S. Army and Navy. The workshop's success led to a call for establishing a regular user group to enhance collaboration in the future.

news.headline: Miata Metals acquires 79North, investing in gold exploration in Suriname.
news.summary: The latest information indicates that there has been a significant increase in the number of confirmed COVID-19 cases in the state. A total of 1,500 new cases were reported in the past 24 hours, bringing the total number of cases to 25,000. Unfortunately, the number of deaths has also risen, with 30 new deaths reported, bringing the total to 500. The spike in cases has put additional strain on the healthcare system, with 80% of hospital beds now occupied. Authorities are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines to help curb the spread of the virus.

news.headline: Healthcare clients of Knightscope add service contracts for e-phones in Mountain View, Calif. ($KSCP)
news.summary: In Mountain View, California, Knightscope reports that clients in the healthcare sector have signed service contracts for E-Phones, worth an undisclosed amount. The security robot company, KSCP, has seen a significant increase in demand for their services in this industry, with contracts being secured for their E-Phones.

news.headline: FDA approved LUMRYZ (sodium oxybate) oral suspension for narcolepsy in patients 7+. Once-at-bedtime treatment for cataplexy/EDS.
news.summary: LUMRYZ is the solitary FDA-endorsed oxybate medication intended for administration at bedtime for individuals aged 7 and above suffering from narcolepsy, including cataplexy or excessive daytime sleepiness (EDS).

news.headline: Synchrony Financial beat Q3 expectations with $4.609B net interest income, $3.814B net revenue, and $789M net earnings. EPS at $1.94.
news.summary: Synchrony Financial (SYF) released its third-quarter financial results, surpassing expectations and raising its FY24 EPS guidance. The company reported a third-quarter net interest income of $4.609 billion, exceeding the consensus of $4.491 billion, a 5.7% YoY increase driven by higher interest and fees on loans. Net revenue also saw a significant increase of 9.8%, reaching $3.814 billion. However, the net interest margin decreased by 32 basis points to 15.04%. Net earnings experienced a substantial 29% YoY growth, totaling $789 million, while EPS stood at $1.94, surpassing the expected $1.81. These successful results are attributed to Synchrony's industry expertise, proprietary data and analytics, and innovative digital capabilities.

news.headline: Analyst believes Bitcoin should be part of portfolios, corporate balance sheets, and retirement accounts, as it could grow into a $100 trillion asset.
news.summary: Metaplanet's Bitcoin strategy Director, Dylan LeClair, views Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) as a significant asset for all investment portfolios. He praised MicroStrategy Inc. (NASDAQ:MSTR) CEO Michael Saylor for utilizing Bitcoin as a hedge. During a Fox Business interview, LeClair highlighted Bitcoin's transformative potential in corporate finance, stating it exceeds being solely a speculative asset. He projected Bitcoin could evolve into a $100 trillion technology, advocating for its inclusion in portfolios, retirement funds, pensions, and corporate balance sheets. LeClair noted the growing interest from Wall Street in Bitcoin.

news.headline: Chipscreen Biosciences submits IND application for anti-tumor drug CS231295 tablets in China.
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China on October 17, 2024, Chipscreen Biosciences Co., Ltd. (Stock Symbol: 688321.SH) filed an Investigational New Drug (IND) application for CS231295 tablets. These tablets are a Class 1 innovative drug, marking a significant milestone for the company.

news.headline: Wipro releases Q3 results for 2024 under IFRS. No specific numbers mentioned in the summary.
news.summary: Wipro Limited, with headquarters in East Brunswick, N.J. and Bangalore, India, released its financial performance report for the quarter ending September 30, 2024, as per International Financial Reporting Standards (IFRS). The company disclosed key figures, including earnings per share, showcasing its performance during this time period.

news.headline: Uber's CEO believes drivers will adjust to automation technology, despite changing dynamics.
Nordic American Tankers Ltd's non-Executive Vice Chairman, Alexander Hansson, acquires additional shares (NYSE: NAT).
Exxat chosen as vendor by Maryland Nursing Consortium for 30+ academic institutions and 50+ sites.
news.summary: Exxat, a prominent provider of clinical and experiential education management solutions, has been chosen to serve a consortium comprising over 30 academic institutions and 50 sites. The selection was announced on October 17, 2024, in Warren, N.J. Exxat will act as the official vendor for handling compliance and placement within the consortium.

news.headline: MDCE / Infinite Auctions (OTC PINK: MDCE) aims to decrease outstanding shares, starting with slashing 200 million in phase one.
news.summary: In Mesa, Arizona on October 17, 2024, Medical Care Technologies Inc. (OTC PINK: MDCE) in collaboration with Infinite Auctions disclosed their strategic initiative to lower the total share count gradually. The first phase of this plan involves decreasing 200 million shares.

news.headline: IFCO reduces interest expense by 0.25% through successful repricing of €1.64 billion Term Loan B, showcasing business resilience.
news.summary: In Munich on October 17, 2024, IFCO, a prominent company specializing in reusable packaging solutions for fresh food, disclosed a significant drop in its interest margin by 0.25% after successfully repricing. This achievement was a result of the amendment and extension (A&E) of its Term Loan B worth €1.64 billion carried out earlier this year.

news.headline: IVI RMA North America to showcase 50+ infertility research studies at ASRM 2024, with 40+ specialists participating.
news.summary: IVI RMA North America, consisting of Reproductive Medicine Associates and Boston IVF, is set to showcase over 50 infertility research studies at the ASRM Annual Scientific Congress and Expo in Denver, Colorado from October 19-23. A team of over 40 IVI RMA North America reproductive endocrinologists, scientists, clinicians, and researchers will present these studies focusing on key issues in the field. The event aims to drive innovation through the discussion of these clinically significant findings.

news.headline: Morgan Stanley Investment Management and Opportunity Finance Network provide $350,000 annual contribution for affordable housing initiatives.
news.summary: Morgan Stanley Investment Management (MSIM) and Opportunity Finance Network (OFN) have revealed the allocation of a segment of the second yearly contribution linked to MSIM’s money market funds’ Impact Class shares. The overall sum of MSIM’s annual contribution, totaling $350,000 and disbursed previously during the year, has been designated for OFN’s Finance Justice Fund. This organization serves as MSIM’s collaboration partner in the realm of diversity and inclusion for the Impact Class shares. The collaboration signifies a positive step towards fostering growth and amplifying the influence of the initiative.

news.headline: ByHeart is expanding into Walmart, Whole Foods Market, and Wegmans, increasing retail presence by over 200% to reach more families with next-gen baby formula.
news.summary: ByHeart, a reputable infant nutrition company, has disclosed its entry into major retail outlets like Walmart, Whole Foods Market, and Wegmans. The company's scientifically supported baby formula will now be available through these trusted retailers, broadening its reach to cater to more families nationwide. This expansion represents a significant growth of over 200% in ByHeart's retail presence within a year. ByHeart remains dedicated to ensuring accessibility of its infant formula to a larger demographic, with plans for further outreach.

news.headline: St. Johns Ship Building in FL signed a contract with Mobro Marine for 2 Spud Barges, each measuring 180 x 54 x 12 feet.
news.summary: In Palatka, Florida on October 17, 2024, St. Johns Ship Building, under Americraft Marine ownership, has confirmed a new contract with Mobro Marine, Inc. to produce two 180 x 54 x 12 Spud Barges. This marks a significant development for the Jones Act facility, emphasizing their partnership with Mobro Marine.

news.headline: Exponential Science launches to advance blockchain & AI convergence, supported by Hedera & other tech firms globally.
news.summary: Exponential Science is a worldwide non-profit organization backed by industry leaders such as Hedera, focusing on advancing emerging technologies to address intricate issues and provide revolutionary solutions. The foundation operates globally to encourage open collaboration and foster innovation.

news.headline: Abitibi Metals expands drilling at B26 Polymetallic Deposit, with new hole intercepting 5.08% Cu Eq over 7.1 metres.
news.summary: The ongoing phase 2 drill program at the Polymetallic B26 Deposit, spanning 16,500 meters, is grabbing attention. A notable drillhole, 1274-24-338, aims to explore the extension of a high-grade lens found in hole 1274-16-236. The latter revealed an impressive 5.08% Cu Eq over a span of 7.1 meters, sparking interest in the current drilling efforts.

news.headline: California company Mira launches Menopause Transitions Kit for women 35+. Monitor helps track hormones for early perimenopause signs.
news.summary: A company called Mira, based in California, has introduced the Mira Hormone Monitor: Menopause Transitions Kit designed for women 35 and older. This kit helps women monitor their hormones to detect early indications of perimenopause and address them proactively. The launch took place in San Ramon, California, on October 17, 2024.

news.headline: Tevogen Bio expects $1B in revenue in launch year, $10-$14B in 5 years. Aims to innovate drug development.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, Tevogen Bio Holdings Inc., a clinical-stage immunotherapy biotech company (Nasdaq: TVGN), based in Warren, NJ, revealed its revenue projections for its oncology pipeline. The company anticipates generating $1 billion in revenue in the first year of its launch, with a cumulative estimate ranging from $10 billion to $14 billion over the next five years. This outlook is attributed to Tevogen's innovative approach to developing off-the-shelf T cell therapeutics for treating infectious diseases and cancers. Their streamlined and cost-effective drug development model is believed to set a new standard for sustainable medical innovation moving forward.

news.headline: Global aluminum door and window market to hit $82.1B by 2031, growing at 3.8% CAGR from $55.8B in 2021. Energy efficiency and sustainability drive demand.
news.summary: The global aluminum door and window market is projected to grow significantly from $55.8 billion in 2021 to an estimated $82.1 billion by 2031, showing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 3.8% from 2022 to 2031. This growth is fueled by factors such as the rising demand for energy-efficient and sustainable building materials, the properties of aluminum making it ideal for various applications, advancements in manufacturing techniques enhancing design flexibility and reducing costs, the trend towards modern architecture favoring aluminum frames, and government initiatives promoting eco-friendly construction and energy conservation. The Allied Market Research report provides insights into the market dynamics, including product types, mechanisms, end-user industries, and opportunities for future growth.

news.headline: Registration for IAMPHENOM 2025 is now open with early bird pricing. Call for speakers and sponsors also announced.
news.summary: Registration for IAMPHENOM 2025 in Philadelphia is now open, offering the earliest bird pricing. The event is seeking speakers and sponsors. This HR Tech event promises to be a key gathering in the industry, with significant participation expected.

news.headline: Wolters Kluwer Health enhances AI-powered UpToDate Enterprise Edition for clinicians and healthcare leaders. Booth #3219 at HLTH 2024 will showcase the solution in Las Vegas.
news.summary: Located in Waltham, Massachusetts, Wolters Kluwer Health is enhancing healthcare delivery through its advanced AI-powered UpToDate® Enterprise Edition solution. This tool is designed to assist healthcare providers in making personalized patient care decisions and assist healthcare leaders in enhancing care through data-informed insights. The company will be showcasing this solution at booth #3219 during HLTH 2024, scheduled for October 21-23 in Las Vegas. "Healthcare institutions globally seek impactful methods to enhance care," mentioned Yaw, emphasizing the need for innovative solutions in the healthcare sector.

news.headline: Emplifi data shows 90% surge in social ad spend before Black Friday with critical gaps in customer support.
news.summary: A customer engagement platform, Emplifi, has shared key findings on social media advertising and customer care trends to aid brands in enhancing their strategies before the Black Friday/Cyber Monday shopping rush. Emplifi's research reveals that ad investment on Facebook and Instagram increased by 90% in the days preceding Black Friday in the previous year, with peak social ad impressions occurring during this timeframe. Click-through rates (CTR) for Black Friday ads remained steady during this period.

news.headline: Wolters Kluwer marking 1st year of AI Labs for UpToDate with new AI features, aiding clinical decision-making for customers.
news.summary: One year after establishing AI Labs for UpToDate®, Wolters Kluwer Health in Waltham, Massachusetts, has introduced enhanced AI features to assist in more informed clinical decision-making. This experimental initiative prioritizes health system clients' involvement in innovation, allowing them to test and provide input on new and prototype AI-based clinical decision support tools. Customers of UpToDate Enterprise Edition will benefit from AI-driven search functionalities, facilitating advanced clinical decision support.

news.headline: Advent Technologies (NASDAQ: ADN) achieves performance breakthroughs in Membrane Electrode Assembly tech for automotive, aerospace industries.
news.summary: Advent Technologies Holdings, Inc. has unveiled major improvements in its Membrane Electrode Assembly (MEA) technology, known as Advent MEA G2. The company, listed on NASDAQ as ADN, is a prominent player in the fuel cell and hydrogen technology sector, based in Livermore, California. The latest advancements in the Advent MEA G2 have led to enhanced performance levels. This cutting-edge technology has been shared with specific partners in the automotive and aerospace sectors for testing purposes. The development of Advent MEA G2 is a significant step forward within the company's framework of innovation and leadership in the industry.

news.headline: Same Day ACH volume surged 67.5% in Q3 2024; 355.2M payments valued at $844B; total ACH payments rose 7.4%.
news.summary: In the third quarter of 2024, there was a significant increase in Same Day ACH volume, which surged by 67.5%, while the total ACH Network payment volume saw a rise of 7.4% compared to the previous year, according to recent data from Nacha. The quarter saw a total of 355.2 million Same Day ACH payments, marking a 38.8% growth in the value of these payments which amounted to $844 billion. The data reflects the ongoing strong adoption of Same Day ACH, with nearly 4 billion payments worth $8 trillion processed since its launch, as highlighted by Jane Larim.

news.headline: 81% of Canadians are urging C-Suite executives to set urgent sustainability goals amid slow progress in corporations.
news.summary: A recent survey conducted in Mississauga, Ontario, shows that Canadians are becoming increasingly frustrated with the sluggish pace of growth in the country's leading corporations, according to Schneider Electric. The survey highlights a growing impatience among Canadians regarding the lack of progress within the largest companies in the country.

news.headline: September 2024 U.S. travel agency air ticket sales reach $8B, marking a 6% YoY increase despite slight seasonal dips.
news.summary: In Arlington, Virginia on October 17, 2024, the Airlines Reporting Corp. (ARC) reported a $8 billion in U.S. travel agency air ticket sales for September 2024, reflecting a 6% year-over-year increase from September 2023. Despite slight seasonal decreases, the sales were on the rise.

news.headline: Celebrity Pickleball Bash launching in 2025 with star-studded equity partners; a sports & entertainment event.
news.summary: In San Francisco on October 17, 2024, an innovative event is set to revolutionize the sports and entertainment industry. The Celebrity Pickleball Bash will introduce a unique concept where celebrities partner with elite players for a series of exciting pickleball showcases. This collaboration promises an electrifying fusion of talent and star power, captivating audiences with high-energy gameplay. Stay tuned for this groundbreaking event that is poised to redefine the sports and entertainment landscape.

news.headline: Illinois American Water awards $96,000 to 97 fire departments, reaching over $1M in grants since 2010. Collaboration is key.
news.summary: In Belleville, Illinois, a total of $96,000 has recently been distributed among 97 fire departments and districts in the state through the 2024 Firefighter Grant Program by Illinois American Water. Since its establishment in 2010, this program has provided over 1,040 grants amounting to more than $1,036,000 to various fire and emergency organizations that cater to Illinois American Water’s service region. An example includes the Pontiac Fire Department, which greatly values partnerships with local entities such as Illinois American Water for support in their operations.

news.headline: "Portage Point Partners adds Ryan Senter as Managing Director in Dallas office on Oct. 17, 2024."
news.summary: In Chicago on October 17, 2024, Ryan Senter has been appointed as the Managing Director in Portage Point Partners, LLC's Dallas office. Portage Point is a renowned firm providing advisory, consulting, interim management, and financial services tailored for the middle market. This appointment marks a significant addition to the team in Dallas.

news.headline: Kong CEO Augusto Marietti recognized as one of the most exceptional entrepreneurs by Goldman Sachs in 2024.
news.summary: Augusto Marietti, a co-founder and the CEO of Kong Inc., a prominent developer of cloud API technologies, has been acknowledged by Goldman Sachs (NYSE: GS) as one of the Most Exceptional Entrepreneurs of 2024. The recognition took place at the Builders and Innovators event. The event, hosted in San Francisco on October 17, 2024, showcased Marietti's significant contributions to the industry.

news.headline: New dating app HaveYouMet cuts small talk, focuses on dates. AI matches, suggests spots for busy singles. Released on Oct 17, 2024.
news.summary: A new AI-driven dating platform has been introduced for busy singles in New York on October 17, 2024. Tired of constant messaging without results? HaveYouMet is here to change that by providing meaningful matches and suggesting ideal date locations within the app. This innovative app aims to facilitate genuine connections for singles seeking serious relationships. With advanced technology at its core, it promises to revolutionize the dating scene by focusing on quality interaction.

news.headline: 94% of business leaders are using generative AI for software development. 20% see it as well-integrated, 33% widely used.
news.summary: A recent report by MIT Technology reveals that 20% of respondents view generative AI as an integral part of their software development lifecycle (SDLC), while 33% acknowledge its widespread use in some aspects of their SDLC. This data was collected in Cambridge, Massachusetts on October 17, 2024.

news.headline: Visual Comfort & Co. partners with designer Anne-Marie Barton for new lighting collection, debuting at Fall High Point Market on Oct. 25-30, 2024.
news.summary: In Houston on October 17, 2024, Visual Comfort & Co. revealed a new collaboration with esteemed interior designer Anne-Marie Barton. The partnership will debut at the Fall High Point Market running from October 25 to 30, 2024. This exciting venture marks an important step for Visual Comfort & Co. as they join forces with Barton to showcase their latest designs and innovations.

news.headline: Klarna can now be used on Apple Pay for checkout online and in-app for eligible U.S. users with iPhone and iPad on iOS 18 and iPadOS 18 or later.
news.summary: As of October 17, 2024, Klarna, a global payments network and shopping assistant utilizing AI technology, is extending its services to users making purchases on Apple Pay through iPhone and iPad devices running on iOS 18 and iPadOS 18 versions or newer. The new integration is now live for eligible Apple Pay users in the U.S., providing a seamless checkout experience for those utilizing the service.

news.headline: Pip Care raises $5M in new funding for surgical optimization services, led by A1 Health Ventures.
news.summary: In New York on October 17, 2024, Pip Care, a company specializing in enhancing the surgical process for both care teams and patients, disclosed the successful completion of their Series A funding round totaling $5 million. A1 Health Ventures spearheaded this funding cycle, backed by continued support from UPMC, a current investor in the company.

news.headline: 65% of loyalty program members desire holiday gifts from brands, reveals Snappy's 2024 report on fostering customer loyalty.
news.summary: In a recent study conducted by Snappy, a Holiday Gifting Report for 2024 uncovered that a significant 65% of Loyalty Program Members express a desire to receive holiday gifts from brands. This data underscores the importance of gift-giving in fostering customer loyalty. The report suggests that brands can greatly benefit from incorporating holiday gifting initiatives into their strategies to engage and retain customers.

news.headline: Equinox Gold (AMEX: EQX) lowers Greenstone Mine guidance. Q3 saw 42,500 oz produced, total 59,000 oz so far. Mining rates up.
news.summary: Equinox Gold Corp. (EQX) stock is down in premarket trading today following the company's announcement of reduced FY24 production guidance for Greenstone Gold Mine. Greenstone produced approximately 42,500 ounces of gold in Q3, marking a 162% increase from the previous quarter. Since its first gold pour on May 22, the total production at Greenstone has reached around 59,000 ounces by the end of September. Mining rates at the mine saw a significant increase in Q3, rising from an average of 76,000 tonnes per day in July to 125,000 tpd in September, with peak rates surpassing 180,000 tpd. This trend has persisted into October, with daily rates averaging 145,000 tpd. For more details, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Global snack food packaging market projected to reach USD 25.8 billion by 2031, growing at CAGR 4.4% - companies focus on supply chain efficiency, compliance, and innovative packaging experiences.
news.summary: The global snack food packaging market is projected to grow at a CAGR of 4.4% from 2023 to 2031, with an estimated sales revenue of US$ 25.8 billion by 2031. Efforts to improve supply chain efficiency are increasing, utilizing data analytics and blockchain technology. Compliance with packaging regulations and sustainability standards is crucial, leading to investments in compliance management systems. Packaging is shifting towards storytelling, using innovative designs to connect with consumers emotionally. Smart packaging technologies like QR codes and NFC tags are enhancing consumer engagement. Pouches are the leading packaging format, plastic, especially PET, dominates the market, and product weight segment of 101 gm to 500 gm leads in versatility.

news.headline: Tencent Music Entertainment shares drop premarket Thursday after announcing partnership with Galaxy Corp for G-Dragon's regional tour. TME to serve as exclusive tour partner for concerts in multiple regions.
news.summary: Tencent Music Entertainment Group (TME) stock is down in premarket trading on Thursday following its announcement of a strategic alliance with Galaxy Corporation, the representative of renowned artist G-Dragon. As per the agreement, TME will act as the sole tour partner for G-Dragon's upcoming shows in various regions such as Southeast Asia, the Middle East, Hong Kong, Macao, Taiwan, Australia, and New Zealand. This partnership aims to boost TME's international footprint and solidify its position in the industry.

news.headline: ECB's President Lagarde: We haven't yet broken the neck of inflation but we are in the process.
CyberArk named 2024 Overall Leader in Privileged Access Management by KuppingerCole; Recognized for PAM in the rapidly-growing market.
news.summary: CyberArk, a leading identity security company, has been designated as an Overall Leader in the 2024 Leadership Compass on Privileged Access Management (PAM) by global IT analyst firm KuppingerCole. The report underscores the rapid expansion of the PAM market due to increased cloud adoption, digital transformation, and the widespread use of identities across multiple platforms. CyberArk, listed on NASDAQ as CYBR, received recognition for its advanced solutions in this evolving industry landscape.

news.headline: TOMI Environmental Solutions reports record Q3 2024 iHP Corporate Service revenue of $650,000, exceeding average $250,000/quarter. Full results on October 30.
news.summary: In Frederick, Maryland, on October 17, 2024, TOMI Environmental Solutions, Inc.® (“TOMI”) (NASDAQ: TOMZ) revealed that its iHP Corporate Service segment is projected to generate around $650,000 in revenue for the quarter ending on September 30, 2024. This amount sets a new quarterly record for the division, exceeding the typical $250,000 per quarter or $1 million annually. The company plans to disclose its complete Q3 financial results, encompassing total revenue for the third quarter, on October 30, 2024.

news.headline: AI interactions by Soul App replicate users' behavior, preferences for companionship, unveiled at 2024 GITEX GLOBAL.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE, on October 17, 2024, a groundbreaking development was announced where a unique digital twin can be created based on an individual's behaviors and preferences. This digital twin allows for interactions that blur the lines between making friends and finding companionship. This innovation opens up new possibilities in personal connections and relationships.

news.headline: Cartier Resources releases drill results near Globex royalty claims; highlights include 14.7 g/t Au over 4.3 m and 15.0 g/t Au over 1.0 m.
news.summary: In Rouyn-Noranda, Quebec, on October 17, 2024, Globex Mining Enterprises Inc. announced that Cartier Resources (TSXV:ECR) revealed new drill results near the north boundary of several Globex 3% Gross Metal Royalty (GMR) claims. The drill holes, located on Globex royalty claims, extend beyond the royalty claims at around 200 meters depth vertically. The latest findings comprise 14.7 g/t Au over 4.3 m within 5.2 g/t Au over 20.6 m and 15.0 g/t Au over 1.0 m within 5.7 g/t Au over 4.0 m in the North Contact Zone. The mineralized intersections' core lengths are reported, with true lengths ranging from 60 to 90 percent. Globex is listed on GMX (Toronto Stock Exchange), G1MN (Frankfurt, Stuttgart, Berlin, Munich, Tradegate, Lang & Schwarz, LS Exchange, TTMzero, Düsseldorf, and Quotrix Düsseldorf Stock Exchanges), and GLBXF (OTCQX International in the US). The comprehensive story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Unitronix Corp integrates tokenized real-world assets into DeFi, bridging finance sectors.
news.summary: Unitronix Corp., based in Marlton, New Jersey, is combining traditional finance with blockchain technology to revolutionize Decentralized Finance (DeFi). The company, known as Unitronix and trading under the symbol UTRX on the OTC market, is a forward-looking entity aiming to drive growth. This integration of finance and blockchain represents a significant leap forward in the DeFi space.
